subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast held fast to the Cord of the Covenant! By the True One, the dwellers in the Abhá Paradise and they who are seated in the celestial court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تمسک بحبل المیثاق تالله الحق ان سکان الرفیق الابهی و المتصدرین فی دسوت
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @love and unity, @firmness in the Covenant, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
